reviews.review_msg: She overexplained lecture materials for a 100 level couse. People like me that aren't Arch majors will find her lectures unhelpful. Quizes were easy but lots of reading and memorizing so if you're not good at that stay away. The midterm was fair but final was pretty hard.

A caring proff and is passionate about answering questions and holding up discussions. He may be a bit unclear with assignments and exams however its an easy class and you just need to read the textbook and do the quizzes and youll be fine.
